meaning: n.嫩枝,小枝,末梢v.注意,了解
examples: He shifted his weight and a twig snapped.
He takes roses, or carnations, pulls out a twig, but only when they're fresh.
The first twig, dear father, that brushes against your hat when you turn your face to come homewards.
The RNA was extracted from the twig of a diseased tree in Ashwellthorpe wood in Norfolk.
Yet every snapping twig brought me closer to a case of the yips.
